# Niraj Patil — Product Manager Portfolio

> Portfolio of Niraj Patil, an Product Engineer building data-driven products with quantified impact across AI, SaaS, and consulting.

Niraj Patil is an Product Engineer and founder. This site showcases featured work (HawkAI, Zeno, AI Onboarding Copilot, Personalized RecSys-LLM, AWS Airbnb Insights, Federated Healthcare Recsys), career experience, skills across product, data science, engineering, and consulting, plus a downloadable resume.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Hero, featured work, experience, skills, education, and contact in a single-page portfolio.

## Resources

- [Resume (PDF)](/Niraj_Patil_Resume.pdf): Latest resume covering product, AI, and engineering experience.
